strengths: Maintained steady instrument control during positioning
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit
Did not secure the loop on the marked appendage

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within the time limit

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching
drills.targets_weakness: Did not secure the loop on the marked appendage

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: 10 secure placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop

progression_note: Focus on completing the full task sequence rather than perfecting individual techniques. At the intermediate level, you should be converting your consistent loop formation skills into faster complete repetitions.
